llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 7.3 (Approval of Disbursement of Measure U Funds for the 2024-2025 School Year) was moved from consent agenda (item 18) to action items as item 7.4. Board member stated: 'I want to move measure U disbursement to action item. It'll be number 7.4.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do we have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. All those in favor?
